description: Mexican criminal organization dedicated to drug trafficking, based in Tepalcatepec, Michoacán. Founded in 2018 by Juan José Farías Álvarez alias 'El Abuelo'. Known for violent confrontations with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel (CJNG) and for using tactics such as explosive-laden drones and roadblocks. Currently operates under the protection of Carteles Unidos.
